sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_lead_in_frame (id UInt32, category String, year UInt16, motivation String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_lead_in_frame (id, category, year, motivation) VALUES (1, 'physics', 2022, 'Quantum Computing'), (2, 'physics', 2023, 'Nanotechnology'), (3, 'chemistry', 2021, 'DNA Repair');
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW physics_lead AS SELECT id, category, year, leadInFrame(year, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY year) AS next_year FROM test_lead_in_frame WHERE category = 'physics';
SELECT id, year, next_year FROM physics_lead ORDER BY year ASC;
UPDATE test_lead_in_frame SET year = leadInFrame(year, 1, 2020) OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY year) WHERE category = 'chemistry';
